description: Canonical relationship taxonomy for the IT Learning Platform knowledge graph.

relationships.label: contains
relationships.meaning: Parent concept includes or is composed of the target concept.

relationships.label: part of
relationships.meaning: Source concept is a component or subtopic of the target concept.

relationships.label: prerequisite
relationships.meaning: Target concept should be understood before the source concept.

relationships.label: uses
relationships.meaning: Source concept uses the target concept during operation or administration.

relationships.label: supports
relationships.meaning: Source concept enables, supports, or provides a platform for the target concept.

relationships.label: runs on
relationships.meaning: Source concept runs on the target platform or operating system.

relationships.label: manages
relationships.meaning: Source concept manages or administers the target concept.

relationships.label: stores
relationships.meaning: Source concept stores or organizes target data.

relationships.label: executes
relationships.meaning: Source concept runs, launches, or executes the target.

relationships.label: communicates with
relationships.meaning: Source concept communicates with the target over a local or network channel.

relationships.label: contrasts with
relationships.meaning: Source concept is commonly compared with the target concept.

relationships.label: replaces
relationships.meaning: Source concept replaces or supersedes the target concept.

relationships.label: related
relationships.meaning: Source concept is generally related to the target when a more precise relationship is not known yet.
